expectations.text: Identifies the broad exception suppression anti-pattern
expectations.evidence: Identifies except Exception: pass suppressing charge failures.

expectations.text: Promotes it from warning to blocker because data integrity and acceptance are affected
expectations.evidence: Connects false paid records to data-integrity risk and blocks.

expectations.text: Requires fixing error handling before completion
expectations.evidence: Requires explicit failure handling and paid status only after confirmed capture.
